name: Henryk the Merchant

special_abilities.name: Trader's Eye
special_abilities.desc: Henryk can appraise the value of any nonmagical item at a glance. He carries a satchel of trade goods and coin.

actions.name: Dagger
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 2 (1d4) piercing damage.

description: A stout, balding merchant in a fur-lined coat. Henryk was heading to Bratislava with a cart of goods when the blizzard forced him to shelter. He's anxious about his wares left in the stable and drinks heavily to steady his nerves. He knows the roads well and has heard rumors of disappearances.
